title: Instant Respawn
description: Skip the death screen and instantly respawn upon death
body:
Do you hate waiting on the death screen after dying in Minecraft?  
Wish you could just **instantly respawn and jump right back into the action**?  
Say hello to **Instant Respawn** – a lightweight Fabric mod that does exactly that!

---

## 🧠 What Does It Do?

**Instant Respawn** is a simple yet powerful Fabric mod that automatically respawns the player immediately after death.  
No more clicking the "Respawn" button. No more delays. You die, and *boom* — you're back in the game!

- ✅ Skips the death screen entirely
- ✅ Respawns the player instantly at their spawn point
- ✅ Works in both **singleplayer** and **multiplayer**
- ✅ Lightweight, no config needed — just install and play!

---

## 🔧 How It Works

This mod listens for the player death event and bypasses the default death screen. It forces an instant respawn using Minecraft’s internal mechanics, making your gameplay smoother and faster, especially during intense survival or PvP moments.

---
